title: limnobium stoloniferum
intro: Limnobium stoloniferum, also known as Amazon frogbit or Amazon water lettuce, is a floating aquatic plant native to the Amazon River basin. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and infections. The health benefits of Limnobium stoloniferum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
